violations.claim: Violation: empty string from getFlag is falsy — flag present, error fires anyway
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P3
; LINE: 482
; Violation: empty string from getFlag is falsy — flag present, error fires anyway
(declare-const flag_present Int)      ; 1 = "--reason" exists in args
(declare-const next_arg_length Int)   ; character length of args[idx+1]
(declare-const reason_truthy Int)     ; 1 = passes !reason guard
; Code transition: getFlag returns args[idx+1] when flag found and idx+1 < length
(assert (= flag_present 1))
; Code transition: caller passed --reason "" → next arg is empty string
(assert (= next_arg_length 0))
; Code transition: empty string is falsy in JavaScript (!("") === true)
(assert (=> (= next_arg_length 0) (= reason_truthy 0)))
; Violation: flag was explicitly provided, yet the usage error fires
(assert (= reason_truthy 0))
(check-sat)
